---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for this project
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement

A clear and concise description of the problem or limitation you are facing.
Example: "I need to fetch odds for sports other than NBA but the sport is hardcoded."

## Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of what you would like to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or workarounds you have considered.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, screenshots, or examples related to the feature request here.
